Surface oxidation was considered for UO(2) and U(3)O(8)
cases, UO(2) was chosen in this work.
Neutron energy resolution 1 MeV at 20 MeV.
Four semi-planar n-type high purity germanium
of planar crystals with depths ranging from 2 to 3 cm
and surfaces between 10 and 28 cm2; were optimized for
high resolution detection at low energies (resolution
of 0.7 keV at 122 keV); were placed at angles of 110

Special lead shielding - to eliminate background
Eu-152 and Ba-133 sources were used for calibration.
The efficiency of the HPGe detectors was calculated
using a GEANT4 simulation code, which is verified
through measurements with calibrated sources. Also very
good agreement with MVNPX code simulation.
